
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Si|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Si|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|qid=Q4697552|lt=Mutual Generation|1=Aioi}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

==Years of Yin Wood Snake==
Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Wood Snake Years'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
*{{ill|45|en|45|qid=Q1166347|lt=45|1=45}}
*{{ill|105|en|105|qid=Q396665|lt=105|1=105}}
*{{ill|165|en|165|qid=Q24743|lt=165|1=165}}
*{{ill|225|en|225|qid=Q30857|lt=225|1=225}}
*{{ill|285|en|285|qid=Q33744|lt=285|1=285}}
*{{ill|345|en|345|qid=Q32144|lt=345|1=345}}
*{{ill|405|en|405|qid=Q32745|lt=405|1=405}}
*{{ill|465|en|465|qid=Q30451|lt=465|1=465}}
*{{ill|525|en|525|qid=Q31031|lt=525|1=525}}
*{{ill|585|en|585|qid=Q32201|lt=585|1=585}}
*{{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}}
*{{ill|705|en|705|qid=Q23504|lt=705|1=705}}
*{{ill|765|en|765|qid=Q31216|lt=765|1=765}}
*{{ill|825|en|825|qid=Q24624|lt=825|1=825}}
*{{ill|885|en|885|qid=Q24894|lt=885|1=885}}
*{{ill|945|en|945|qid=Q24199|lt=945|1=945}}
|
*{{ill|1005|en|1005|qid=Q19231|lt=1005|1=1005}}
*{{ill|1065|en|1065|qid=Q19407|lt=1065|1=1065}}
*{{ill|1125|en|1125|qid=Q23799|lt=1125|1=1125}}
*{{ill|1185|en|1185|qid=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}}
*{{ill|1245|en|1245|qid=Q5440|lt=1245|1=1245}}
*{{ill|1305|en|1305|qid=Q5624|lt=1305|1=1305}}
*{{ill|1365|en|1365|qid=Q6190|lt=1365|1=1365}}
*{{ill|1425|en|1425|qid=Q6283|lt=1425|1=1425}}
*{{ill|1485|en|1485|qid=Q6644|lt=1485|1=1485}}
*{{ill|1545|en|1545|qid=Q6531|lt=1545|1=1545}}
*{{ill|1605|en|1605|qid=Q6741|lt=1605|1=1605}}
*{{ill|1665|en|1665|qid=Q7582|lt=1665|1=1665}}
*{{ill|1725|en|1725|qid=Q6932|lt=1725|1=1725}}
*{{ill|1785|en|1785|qid=Q7756|lt=1785|1=1785}}
*{{ill|1845|en|1845|qid=Q7636|lt=1845|1=1845}}
*{{ill|1905|en|1905|qid=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}}
*{{ill|1965|en|1965|qid=Q2650|lt=1965|1=1965}}
|
*{{ill|2025|en|2025|qid=Q49616|lt=2025|1=2025}}
*{{ill|2085|en|2085|qid=Q972493|lt=2085|1=2085}}
*[[:en:2145|2145]]
*[[:en:2205|2205]]
*[[:en:2265|2265]]
*{{ill|2325|en|2325|qid=Q97232774|lt=2325|1=2325}}
*[[:en:2385|2385]]
*[[:en:2445|2445]]
*[[2505]]
*[[2565]]
*[[2625]]
*[[2685]]
*[[2745]]
*[[2805]]
*[[2865]]
*[[:en:2925|2925]]
*[[:en:2985|2985]]
|}

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Emperor Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|qid=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident|1=Isshi incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|qid=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty|1=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|qid=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|qid=Q405|lt=Month|1=Moon}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|qid=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|qid=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}} cycle.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}
* {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Snake|qq=ja|乙巳|version=98658114|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q905031|af|Houtslang (astrologie)|cdo|Ĭk-sê̤ṳ|de|Holz-Schlange|fr|Serpent de bois|hak|Yet-sṳ|ja|乙巳|ko|을사|vi|Ất Tỵ|za|Ietceih|zh-min-nan|It-sū|zh-yue|乙巳|zh|乙巳|zh-min-nan|Kui-chhiū|zh-yue|癸酉|cdo|Kui-cṳ̄de|nds|Erd-Hahnvi|de|Yin Wood Snake|af|Aardehaan (astrologie)|de|Erde-Hahneen|en|Earth Rooster|fr|Coq de terreboishak|it|Kui-chṳ́id|ko|계유|vi|Quý Dậu|za|Gueiceij|zh|癸酉|ar|Yin Wood Snake}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
